message: Jake
Gordon
Miles
came to the Kasbah.
But unfortunately, it seems that they are not open today.
It's in front of Cabas. The door is firmly closed.
Let's try coming back later.
Oh, there you are again.
I thought I was lucky the shop was open, but you’re here.
Don't make that gloomy face. It hurts, you know.
You again.
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
Surroundings
Tony.
About　him.
Concerning　him.
About Tony.
Somewhere else.
Save
Exit the game.
From here, I can't see the customers inside the bar. I'm curious about the faces those important people make while drinking.
A girl in a boldly cut dress is standing. The blonde hair reflects the light, quite beautiful.
It seems she's instructed not to let me in at all. Soon, they'll call a scary brother over.
He’s still the same daft guy. Doesn’t look tough at all.
Should I try taking a swing?
A striking man in a flashy red suit with a matching hat and sunglasses,
is quite conspicuous. A plain office burglar doesn’t suit him.
From what I can see, he doesn't look like that bad of a guy. He has to eat too, after all.
What's up? You here to sign up for membership or something?
Nah, not at all. I just wanted to hear a bit about Tonny.
I've been in Ford's care, you know.
Isn't San around?
Not right now.
I.
Is it okay to be talking with you?
Well, there’s really nothing to talk about. If it got out that I talked to you, I might be in trouble.
You alright?
I might just disappear for a bit.
Well, I guess it’ll work out somehow.
You take care too.
I’m not going to say anything bad because I've got Ford to think about.
No, I heard Tony talking about snuff.
W-What the hell, are you stupid?! Don’t say that word in a place like this!
I don’t know what you expect from me, but I have nothing.
Got it, it’s a secret, for sure.
San filmed a snuff video.
Can you tell me more about that time?
Back then, we were all high, playing doctor. We were cutting up some woman's body with a scalpel.
That doesn’t mean it’s a serial murder case. It was just butchery, not dismembering.
Ugh, I think I'm gonna throw up.
Were you there too?
Just kidding, I was just standing guard. They showed me the video later. I can’t understand why anyone would buy that.
Ford really is a pitiful guy. It makes you wonder how he ended up like that.
San.
Just between us, he's super scary. You probably had a hint of that, though.
He really looks intimidating, doesn't he?
Right? He's strong as hell, just like he looks. He's exactly what you expect. I swear, I could be made to obey with just a finger.
You shouldn't talk about anything related to that guy.
I can't say anything, but it’s definitely better not to piss him off.
Only someone like
could talk about Tony, though.
What Tony said was true after all. Drugs and Snuff Video, it was all a fact.
Is it really okay for me to spill about Tony? I hope I don't get killed to keep my mouth shut.
Compared to Tony, though,
feels a lot healthier and normal.
If Tony was set up,
the scalpel might be the one used at that time.
So what Tony said was true after all.
What kind of profit did
gain from setting up Tony? In reality, Tony was also a victim.
But the real bad guy was
the one who led him into a world he shouldn't have stepped into. That's what you call getting what you deserve.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
